text.title: Statistical Significance: Application Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
fetch raw n + x per arm before analysis
halt — re-run with pre-committed n via power analysis
declare MDE retrospectively only with caveat; pre-declare next time
compute + report 95% CI on effect size
publish verdict + commit to test log

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=report-confidence-interval
